title: PICUSim / Pediatric Critical Care Sim: modular pediatric critical-care physiology simulation framework
description: PICUSim / Pediatric Critical Care Sim is a modular pediatric critical-care physiology simulation framework for education, scenario design, in-silico research prototyping, software testing and hypothesis generation. The release-candidate package includes physiological and pharmacological modules, YAML clinical scenarios, a local FastAPI backend, a browser-based training console, validation-support artifacts, regression reports, reproducibility outputs and publication-readiness documentation. This software is not a medical device and is not for clinical use, diagnosis, treatment, prescribing, triage, bedside monitoring, prognostication, device control, patient-specific modelling or patient-care decisions.
notes: Author: Paolo Taffache, MD. Affiliation: IRCCS Azienda Ospedaliero-Universitaria Bologna. DOI, OSF URL and manuscript identifiers will be added only after public deposit identifiers exist. Safety disclaimer must remain visible.
